name: NLP Cloud API
description: NLP Cloud serves high performance pre-trained and custom models for NLP, sentiment analysis, classification, summarization, paraphrasing, grammar and spelling correction, entities, keywords extraction, text generation, image generation, code generation, question answering, translation, language detection, speech synthesis, and more. Built on spaCy and Hugging Face transformers.
